net.bhl.cdt.paxelerate.model

Interface SimulationResult

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject, org.eclipse.emf.common.notify.Notifier
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    SimulationResultImpl

    public interface SimulationResult
extends org.eclipse.emf.ecore.EObject
    A representation of the model object 'Simulation Result'.

    The following features are supported:

    • Boarding Time
    • Passengers
    • Name
    • Id
    • Date
    • Boarding Time String
    • Waymaking Skipped
    • Waymaking Completed
    • Layout Concept Type
    See Also:
    CabinPackage.getSimulationResult()

    • Method Detail

      • getBoardingTime

        double getBoardingTime()
        Returns the value of the 'Boarding Time' attribute.

        If the meaning of the 'Boarding Time' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Boarding Time' attribute.
        See Also:
        setBoardingTime(double), CabinPackage.getSimulationResult_BoardingTime()

      • setBoardingTime

        Sets the value of the 'Boarding Time' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Boarding Time' attribute.
        See Also:
        getBoardingTime()

      • getLayoutConceptType

        LayoutConcept getLayoutConceptType()
        Returns the value of the 'Layout Concept Type' attribute. The default value is "Default". The literals are from the enumeration LayoutConcept.

        If the meaning of the 'Layout Concept Type' attribute isn't clear, there really should be more of a description here...

        Returns:
        the value of the 'Layout Concept Type' attribute.
        See Also:
        LayoutConcept, setLayoutConceptType(LayoutConcept), CabinPackage.getSimulationResult_LayoutConceptType()

      • setLayoutConceptType

        void setLayoutConceptType(LayoutConcept value)
        Sets the value of the 'Layout Concept Type' attribute.
        Parameters:
        value - the new value of the 'Layout Concept Type' attribute.
        See Also:
        LayoutConcept, getLayoutConceptType()
